testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51300/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c118a5403d0077fdbeb3399d398b618a at testcase.name: acc_reg
